subcodes.first_line: O ye true, pure souls! Your letter was received. You have expressed happiness on account of my trip to Egypt. Through this trip the fame of the cause
subcodes.first_line_orig: از سفر من به مصر اظهار سرور نموده بودید از این سفر صیت امر اللّه جهانگیر گردد
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
